title: Japanese Foie Gras Teriyaki
description: A luxurious and savory Japanese-inspired dish featuring seared foie gras in a sweet teriyaki sauce.
instructions: 1. Preheat a skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Season the foie gras with salt and pepper.
3. Sear the foie gras in the skillet for 1-2 minutes per side, or until golden brown.
4. Meanwhile, combine the panna, golden, gooey, soy sauce, and rice vinegar in a small saucepan.
5. Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until thickened.
6. Remove the foie gras from the skillet and place it on a plate.
7. Spoon the teriyaki sauce over the foie gras.
8. Serve immediately and garnish with sesame seeds and thinly sliced scallions, if desired.
